steps.description: In the "Input CT Volume" option, choose the Pelvic Volume.

sub_operations.description: Select the input CT volume for pelvic fracture planning
sub_operations.question: Select the input CT volume

ui_guidance.title: Select Input CT Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the pelvic volume from the list.

sub_operations.description: Segment the pelvis from the input volume

ui_guidance.title: Segment Pelvis
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the button to run pelvis segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Segment fracture fragments from the input volume

ui_guidance.title: Segment Fractures
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the button to segment fractures.

steps.description: In the "Untick any fragments to exclude it from planning" section, untick these segments.

sub_operations.description: Select which fracture fragments to exclude from planning
sub_operations.question: Untick fragments to exclude from planning

choice_info.question: Untick fragments to exclude from planning

ui_guidance.title: Exclude Fragments
ui_guidance.instruction: Untick fragments to exclude from planning.

sub_operations.description: Generate reduction template models from pelvis segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Generate Template
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the button to generate the template.

ui_guidance.title: Register Reduce
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the button to run registration/reduction.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Manually adjust a fragment" checkbox. If not, jump to step 11.

sub_operations.description: Decide whether to manually adjust a fracture fragment
sub_operations.question: Further adjustments required?

ui_guidance.title: Manual Adjustment Needed?
ui_guidance.instruction: Tick 'Manually adjust a fragment' if further adjustments are required.

steps.description: In the "Fragment" option, Choose which fragment needs adjustment in the "Fragment" selection box.

sub_operations.description: Select the fracture fragment to manually adjust
sub_operations.question: Select fragment to adjust

ui_guidance.title: Select Fragment to Adjust
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the fragment you want to adjust from the drop-down.

steps.description: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the position and rotation of the selected fracture fragment

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Fragment Pose
ui_guidance.instruction: Use the transform tools to adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.

sub_operations.description: Apply the manual adjustments to the fragment

ui_guidance.title: Apply Adjustments
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the button to apply the manual adjustments.

steps.description: Click the "Run Step 5: Plan Screws" button.

sub_operations.description: Plan screw trajectories for fracture reduction

ui_guidance.title: Plan Screws
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the button to plan screw trajectories.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, tick the "Edit Screw trajectories" checkbox. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Decide whether to edit screw trajectories manually
sub_operations.question: Edit screw trajectories?

ui_guidance.title: Edit Screw Trajectories?
ui_guidance.instruction: Tick 'Edit Screw trajectories' to modify screw paths, or skip to finish.

steps.description: Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the position and rotation of screw trajectories

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Screw Trajectories
ui_guidance.instruction: Use the transform tools to adjust the screw trajectories.

steps.description: Click the "Regenerate screws from edited lines" button.

sub_operations.description: Regenerate screw models after manual editing

ui_guidance.title: Regenerate Screws
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the button to regenerate screws from the edited lines.

sub_operations.description: Disable edit mode for screw trajectories

ui_guidance.title: Finish Editing Screws
ui_guidance.instruction: Untick the 'Edit Screw trajectories' checkbox to finalize.
